title: The Christmas Party
content:
Christmas was coming up, and Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao decided to throw a Christmas party.

They invited all their friends, and they spent days decorating the apartment.

Su Xiaoxiao bought a Christmas tree, and they decorated it with lights and ornaments.

"This looks amazing!" Su Xiaoxiao said, stepping back to admire their work.

Lin Yu smiled. "Yeah, it does."

***

On Christmas Eve, their friends arrived. The apartment was filled with laughter and music.

Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao cooked dinner together, and they all ate and drank and had a great time.

After dinner, they played games and opened presents.

"Lin Yu," Su Xiaoxiao said, handing him a present.

Lin Yu opened it, and he found a cute sweater with a cat on it.

"I love it!" Lin Yu said.

Su Xiaoxiao smiled. "I'm glad you like it!"

Lin Yu handed Su Xiaoxiao a present. "Here's yours."

Su Xiaoxiao opened it, and she found a necklace with a small heart pendant.

"Oh, Lin Yu!" Su Xiaoxiao said, her eyes filled with tears. "This is beautiful!"

Lin Yu smiled. "I'm glad you like it."

***

Later that night, after their friends had left, Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao sat by the Christmas tree, holding hands.

"This has been the best Christmas ever," Su Xiaoxiao said.

Lin Yu nodded. "Yeah, it has."

He looked at Su Xiaoxiao, his eyes soft. "I love you, Su Xiaoxiao."

Su Xiaoxiao smiled. "I love you too, Lin Yu."

They kissed, and the Christmas lights twinkled around them.

For a moment, everything felt perfect.

***

As they lay in bed that night, Lin Yu thought about how lucky he was.

He had found the love of his life, and she was right there, sleeping next to him.

He knew that life with Su Xiaoxiao would always be an adventure, and he couldn't wait to see what the future held.

Merry Christmas, he thought. And here's to many more.

Their love story was just beginning, and it was going to be amazing.
